problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus — specifically Deep brain stimulation — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
